text: Can you use an adult AED on an infant?

options.text: C) Only if the infant is at least 6 months old
D) Only if the infant is at least 1 year old

explanation: Adult AEDs are not recommended for use on infants under eight years old or weighing less than 55 pounds. Paediatric pads and attenuator devices are designed to deliver a lower energy shock appropriate for infants and children, minimizing the risk of cardiac damage.
